{{Quote|I learned to hate Imperials. But I learned to hate someone else, too—my father. I blamed him for our troubles; I was too young to understand what he fought, and why his Jedi 'magic' couldn't make the Imperials disappear.|Axton Tredway's son, Erling|<ref name="JH" />}}
'''Axton Tredway''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the final years of both institutions. A survivor of the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the beginning of the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]], Tredway was eventually killed by [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].

==Biography==
===Jedi===
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Axton Tredway was born into the wealthy [[Tredway family]]. As a [[Youngling/Legends|youngling]], Tredway was given to the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] for [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in [[Force power/Legends|the ways]] of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Tredway [[Marriage/Legends|married]] a [[Tredway|woman]], and fathered two children, [[Dena Tredway|Dena]] and [[Erling Tredway|Erling]], and kept them with their mother at his family's estate on the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[24 Tredway]] in the [[Sil'Lume asteroid belt]]. While not on assignment for the High Council, Tredway returned to his home and aided in the family's mining business. Tredway became well acquainted with fellow Knight [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], and introduced Skywalker to his family.<ref name="JH" />

===The purge===
In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] revealed himself to the Jedi Order as the mysterious [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Sidious, defeating the Jedi's leaders and issuing [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], which caused the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] of the Grand Army to turn on their Jedi commanders, executing thousands across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Hidden within his estate, Tredway avoided the beginning of the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]].<ref name="JH" />

Tredway did not stay hidden for long, as he had made a costly error in showing Skywalker the location of his secret abode. Skywalker had fallen to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] and became known as Darth Vader, Sidious's most powerful [[Jedi hunter/Legends|Jedi hunter]]. Not long after the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces arrived in the asteroid field, seeking Tredway. The Jedi fled his home, hoping to draw attention away from his family and their business, but the Empire continued their harassment. Though they did not harm the Tredway family, Tredway's son Erling grew resentful of his father for leaving them with such a burden, too young to understand what was going on. At one point, Tredway returned, and Erling confronted him, furious over his absence.<ref name="JH" />

Tredway was stirred by his son's words, and decided to fight the Imperial presence. When the Imperials returned, seeking to further punish the family, Tredway fought them, defeating the entire force. His victory was short-lived, however; his stand had drawn the attention of Vader, Tredway's former friend. Vader appeared in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] over the asteroid, quickly storming the estate and confronting Tredway. After a brief [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duel]], Vader [[Death/Legends|executed]] Tredway, but allowed his family to live.<ref name="JH" />

===Legacy===
Gravely shaken by their patriarch's death, the Tredway family carried on, with his wife supporting the children until they were old enough to join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and fight the Empire in their own way. However, the two earned Imperial [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Sebastian Parnell]]'s anger, and in his attempt to hunt down Erling, he destroyed 24 Tredway, killing Tredway's wife and injuring Dena.<ref name="JH" />
